testcase.name: getTimeoutApprovals_shouldReturnList
testcase.system-out: 12:14:40.978 [main] INFO com.aioa.workflow.service.impl.WorkflowMonitorServiceImpl -- 发现1个超时审批单

testcase.name: getHealthStatus_whenWarning_shouldReturnLowerScore
testcase.system-out: 12:14:41.024 [main] INFO com.aioa.workflow.service.impl.WorkflowMonitorServiceImpl -- 发现1个超时审批单

testcase.name: getHealthStatus_withNoOverdue_shouldReturnPerfectScore
testcase.system-out: 12:14:41.048 [main] INFO com.aioa.workflow.service.impl.WorkflowMonitorServiceImpl -- 发现0个超时审批单

testcase.name: getWorkflowStatistics_withTimeRange_shouldFilterByTime
testcase.system-out: 12:14:41.088 [main] INFO com.aioa.workflow.service.impl.WorkflowMonitorServiceImpl -- 流程统计: 总数=15, 待审批=5, 已同意=5, 已驳回=5

testcase.name: getHealthStatus_whenCritical_shouldReturnLowScore
testcase.system-out: 12:14:41.109 [main] INFO com.aioa.workflow.service.impl.WorkflowMonitorServiceImpl -- 发现5个超时审批单

testcase.name: getHealthStatus_whenHealthy_shouldReturnGoodScore
testcase.system-out: 12:14:41.121 [main] INFO com.aioa.workflow.service.impl.WorkflowMonitorServiceImpl -- 发现0个超时审批单

testcase.name: getWorkflowStatistics_shouldReturnCorrectData
testcase.system-out: 12:14:41.131 [main] INFO com.aioa.workflow.service.impl.WorkflowMonitorServiceImpl -- 流程统计: 总数=30, 待审批=10, 已同意=10, 已驳回=10
